name: Zerodha Settlement Engine — Distributed Lock Coordination
scenario: Zerodha's settlement service runs on 5 instances. End-of-day settlement at 3:30pm must run exactly once. Payment confirmations must be idempotent. Monthly statements must be generated exactly once per month. Build the distributed lock infrastructure that makes all three work correctly.
description: RedisDistributedLock service (SETNX + UUID + Lua release) + SettlementJob @Scheduled + PaymentIdempotency service + 4 @SpringBootTest tests verifying mutual exclusion and idempotency.

core.description: RedisDistributedLock @Service: tryAcquire(key, ttl) returns UUID or null. release(key, uuid) with GET+compare+DEL (owner check). runOnce(key, ttl, Runnable) returns boolean. All methods handle null returns from Redis safely.

DailySettlementJob @Scheduled (3:30pm MON-FRI): lock key 'lock:settlement:{LocalDate}', TTL=15min. Logs instance ID (8-char UUID prefix), whether it ran or skipped. AtomicInteger runCount for test verification.

PaymentIdempotencyService.processPayment(idempotencyKey, amount): 3-state (CACHED→return, IN_PROGRESS→throw, NOT_STARTED→process+cache). Result key 'pay:result:{key}' with 24h TTL. Lock key 'pay:lock:{key}' with 30s TTL. AtomicInteger processCount.
MonthlyStatementJob @Scheduled (1st of month, midnight): lock key 'lock:statement:{YearMonth}', TTL=2h. Logs year-month being processed.

@SpringBootTest (4 tests): (1) settlement runOnce returns true first time, false second time, (2) runCount=1 after two attempts, (3) processPayment with same key twice: processCount=1, second returns cached, (4) isDone() after settlement=true. All 4 pass.

bonus.description: Lua atomic release: replace GET+compare+DEL with DefaultRedisScript for true atomic compare-and-delete. Test verifying atomicRelease returns false when value doesn't match.

LeaderElectionService: tryBecomeLeader(), isLeader(), renewLeadership() @Scheduled every 20s, stepDown(). @SpringBootTest: two services → one becomes leader, other returns false. Use unique keys per test run.
LockWithRetry.tryAcquireWithWait(key, ttl, maxWaitMs): polling retry every 50ms up to maxWaitMs. Throws LockTimeoutException if not acquired. Test: second thread acquires after first releases.

data_to_use:
Test setup:
  today = LocalDate.now()
  lockKey = 'lock:settlement:{today}'
  idempotencyKey = 'IDEM-TEST-' + UUID

Expected behaviors:
  Settlement attempt 1 (lock free): runs, runCount=1
  Settlement attempt 2 (lock held): skipped, runCount still 1
  processPayment(KEY1, 999.0) call 1: processes, processCount=1
  processPayment(KEY1, 999.0) call 2: returns cached, processCount still 1
example_output:
# Test output:
[Instance a1b2c3d4] Running settlement for 2024-06-15...
[Instance a1b2c3d4] Settlement complete.
[Instance e5f6g7h8] Skipped — settlement for 2024-06-15 already running.

[PROCESS] IDEM-TEST-1234 → PAY-1718476842000 (₹999.00)
[CACHED] IDEM-TEST-1234 → {"id":"PAY-1718476842000","status":"captured"}

# Tests:
✓ settlement_runsOnceReturnsTrueFalse
✓ settlement_runCountIsOne
✓ idempotency_processesOnlyOnce
✓ isDone_trueAfterSettlement
ai_policy_explanation: Limited to 5 hints. setIfAbsent three-argument version: CRITICAL — must include Duration. Two-argument version has no TTL → permanent lock on crash. UUID lock value: store it to use for ownership check on release. @BeforeEach test cleanup: delete both the lock key AND the completion/result key (two separate keys). runOnce try-finally: exception in task still releases the lock. AtomicInteger runCount: thread-safe counter for test verification of exactly-once semantics.
submission_instructions: GitHub push. All 4 @SpringBootTest tests pass. README explains: (1) why TTL is mandatory, (2) why UUID value prevents wrong-instance release, (3) idempotency key flow diagram.
tips_for_success: Three-argument setIfAbsent: setIfAbsent(key, value, Duration) — always use this form
Test isolation: include UUID or timestamp in test lock keys to prevent test interference
@BeforeEach: delete BOTH lock key AND completion/result key separately
PaymentIdempotency: on exception, delete LOCK but NOT result — allows clean retry
concepts_reinforced: SETNX atomic acquisition with TTL (crash safety)
UUID lock value for ownership verification on release
Date/period in key for natural single-use per time period
Failure handling: don't cache error, allow retry
